visualGoal: Make a subscription-averse home-bay buyer understand the 2026 reality before they buy: the SkyTrak+ is a discontinued closeout, the ST MAX is the live unit, and SkyTrak dropped official GSPro/E6 support for new buyers. Real launch-monitor product proof throughout; no procedural art.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Referenced only in passing as the overhead alternative with native GSPro/E6/TGC support (no software-policy asterisk). Currently text-only + Amazon search link because no verified image exists. Source a real photo before it can appear as a gearpick/shotgrid or before certification if the shortlist should show it.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic dim gold-lit home golf simulator bay at dusk, a photometric launch monitor sitting beside a teed ball on a premium hitting mat, an open product-overlay footprint left clear beside the ball for a real SkyTrak+ product image, impact screen softly glowing in the background, curator Nina Brooks standing to the side reviewing numbers on a tablet, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI text, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake launch monitor, warped hardware, unreadable tiny text, procedural gradient art, impossible room geometry

infographicPrompts.title: SkyTrak membership tiers (2026)
content: Basic FREE - driving range, PinSeeker, shot recording
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center chart, large readable text, golf greens-and-gold palette, real SkyTrak product photo as the header marker for Codex overlay

infographicPrompts.title: SkyTrak+ vs ST MAX: what actually differs
content: Hitting zone: same ~40% larger (came with the +, not MAX)
ST MAX only: faster processor, dual USB-C, GOLFTEC speed training
Price: SkyTrak+ ~$1,795-1,995 closeout vs ST MAX ~$2,995
Status: SkyTrak+ discontinued / ST MAX in production
infographicPrompts.style: Two-column comparison card, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays (skytrak-plus.jpg left, skytrak-st-max.jpg right)

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult golf gear curator Nina Brooks in a tidy home simulator bay, one hand gesturing toward a laptop showing a generic simulator connection screen (no real branded UI), thoughtful cautionary energy as if explaining a caveat, product-overlay space beside her, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

openQuestions: Does any retailer still enable a NATIVE GSPro/E6 connection on a NEW SkyTrak+ or ST MAX unit in 2026, or is it Course Play only for new buyers? This is the certification-critical open item.
Confirm the exact SkyTrak+ closeout floor (seen $1,795 and $1,995 across retailers).
Re-verify the 2026 membership prices (Basic/Essential/Core Foresight/Core Trackman/Elite) at cert time in case SkyTrak re-tiers.
Do we want to source a real Uneekor EYE XO2 photo to promote it from text-only to a body visual as the no-asterisk overhead alternative?
